Package de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures

Class MergeWithPredicateAbstractionFactory

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.MergeProcedure
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures.MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures.MergeWithPredicateAbstraction
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.merge.procedures.MergeWithPredicateAbstractionFactory
All Implemented Interfaces:
ParametricMergeProcedure
public class MergeWithPredicateAbstractionFactory extends MergeWithPredicateAbstraction
A factory class for MergeWithPredicateAbstraction which is itself a MergeProcedure. This class is used by the merge rule completion GUI which needs in instance for every merge procedure ( MergeWithPredicateAbstraction cannot be statically instantiated since it depends on the list of predicates). MergeWithPredicateAbstractionFactory is a Singleton.

  • Method Details

    • instance

      public static MergeWithPredicateAbstractionFactory instance()
      Returns:
      The Singleton instance of MergeWithPredicateAbstractionFactory.

    • mergeValuesInStates

      public MergeProcedure.ValuesMergeResult mergeValuesInStates(Term v, SymbolicExecutionState state1, Term valueInState1, SymbolicExecutionState state2, Term valueInState2, Term distinguishingFormula, Services services)
      Description copied from class: MergeProcedure
      Merges two values valueInState1 and valueInState2 of corresponding SE states state1 and state2 to a new value of a merge state.
      Overrides:
      mergeValuesInStates in class MergeWithLatticeAbstraction
      Parameters:
      v - The variable for which the values should be merged
      state1 - First SE state.
      valueInState1 - Value in state1.
      state2 - Second SE state.
      valueInState2 - Value in state2.
      distinguishingFormula - The user-specified distinguishing formula. May be null (for automatic generation).
      services - The services object.
      Returns:
      The merge result.

    • complete

      public boolean complete()
      Description copied from class: MergeProcedure
      Similar to AbstractBuiltInRuleApp.complete(). Method was introduced for predicate abstraction (which is not complete if the abstraction predicates are not set).
      Overrides:
      complete in class MergeWithPredicateAbstraction
      Returns:
      true iff the merge procedure is complete (all neede parameters are set).

    • instantiate

      public MergeWithPredicateAbstraction instantiate(Iterable<AbstractionPredicate> predicates, Class<? extends AbstractPredicateAbstractionLattice> latticeType, LinkedHashMap<ProgramVariable,AbstractDomainElement> userChoices)
      Creates a complete instance of MergeWithPredicateAbstraction.
      Parameters:
      predicates - The predicates for the lattices to create.
      latticeType - The concrete lattice type which determines how abstract elements are generated from abstraction predicates.
      Returns:
      A complete instance of MergeWithPredicateAbstraction.
